UserPromptSubmit.command: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; $logPath = Join-Path $PSScriptRoot 'agent_log.txt'; $input | ForEach-Object { \"[$timestamp] USER_QUESTION: $_\" | Add-Content -Path $logPath -Encoding UTF8 }"

PreToolUse.command: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; $logPath = Join-Path $PSScriptRoot 'agent_log.txt'; $input | ForEach-Object { \"[$timestamp] TOOL_USED: $_\" | Add-Content -Path $logPath -Encoding UTF8 }"

PostToolUse.command: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; $logPath = Join-Path $PSScriptRoot 'agent_log.txt'; $input | ForEach-Object { \"[$timestamp] TOOL_RESULT: $_\" | Add-Content -Path $logPath -Encoding UTF8 }"
